titleStmt.title: SII 41.152: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 152. (A.R. No. 151 of 1905.) Modakkūr, Karur Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the north wall of the central shrine the Meypporuḷ-nathasvamin temple at Moḍakkūr.

p.hi: Kongu Chōḻa Kōṉērinmaikoṇḍāṉ Year 15 = c. 13th century A.D.

summary.p: This may be a sequel to the king's order recorded in the Karur inscription above (136/1905). This is a royal communication to the kaṇmāḷa community of Veṅgāla-nāḍu, Araiya-nāḍu, Iḍaippuḻudi-nāḍu, Vaḍakarai-Maṇalūr-nāḍu, Taṭṭaiyūr-nāḍu, and Kiḻaṅga-nāḍu granting them the privileges of using double conches and the bērikai drum for both joyous and sorrowful occasions, wearing chappals, and of using lime paste for their houses. The officers who signed the document were Viḻuppādarāyaṉ and Kāliṅgarāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravatti koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ talaiyūrnāṭu veṅkālanāṭu Araiyanāṭu Iṭaippuḻutināṭu vaṭakarai maṇalūrnāṭu taṭṭaiyūrnāṭu kiḻaṅkanāṭu Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟil kaṇmāḷarkku patiṉaiñcāvatu Āṭimātam mutal taṅkaḷuk
ku naṉmaittimaikku Iraṭṭaic caṅkum Ūtip perikaiyuḷḷiṭṭaṉa koṭṭivittuk koḷḷavum tāṅkaḷ puṟappaṭaveṇṭum Iṭaṅkaḷukku pādarakṣai kottukkoḷḷavum taṅkaḷ viṭukaḷukkuc cāntiṭṭuk koḷḷavum coṉṉo
m Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu candrādityavat celvatākat taṅkaḷukku veṇṭiṉa Iṭaṅkaḷile kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷka Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 10 5 nāḷ 2 10 1
Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 41.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
